Our Story

Authentic South IndianFilter CoffeeRedefined

Madras Coffee Café is a fast-growing coffee brand born in India in 2024. We have transformed the beloved tradition of South Indian filter coffee into a premium lifestyle experience — keeping every sip true to its roots while wrapping it in modern comfort.

From our first outlet, we've grown into one of India's fastest-growing coffee franchise brands, built on one promise: consistency in taste, aroma, and presentation across every single cup.

2024
Founded
45
Days to Launch
₹6L

Vision & Mission

Where Tradition MeetsModern Comfort

🎯

Our Vision

To transform traditional filter coffee into a premium lifestyle experience, accessible to every Indian coffee lover.

⭐

Our Mission

Maintain absolute consistency in taste, aroma, and presentation across all outlets for total customer satisfaction.

🇮🇳

Our Promise

Promote India's most trusted South Indian coffee café franchise — a legacy of flavour, a future of growth.

Founder's Talk

Every Cup Tells a Story

The heart & soul behind Madras Coffee Café

☕
RS

Rohit Sudha

Founder & Director

Driven by a deep passion for culture and authentic flavours, Rohit leads with vision — turning childhood memories of morning coffee rituals into a brand the whole nation can experience.

PS

Praneeth Sudha

Co-Founder & Director

With a sharp eye for operations and a love for tradition, Praneeth ensures that every outlet, every cup, every customer interaction lives up to the promise that started it all.

🌱

How It Began

We didn't start with a big investment or a corporate blueprint. We started with something far more powerful — emotion, culture, and a deep love for South Indian filter coffee.

Growing up, coffee wasn't just a drink in our home. It was a ritual. The aroma in the morning, the steel tumbler in hand, the conversations that followed — those were moments we never forgot.

💡

The Question That Changed Everything

As coffee culture grew rapidly across India, we noticed something troubling: authentic South Indian filter coffee was slowly losing its identity inside modern cafés.

That's when we asked ourselves one simple question — "Why can't tradition feel premium?" That question gave birth to Madras Coffee Café in 2024.

🚀

Our Beginning

In 2024, with a small setup and a big vision, we launched our first outlet — not just as a café, but as an experience. We wanted every customer to feel the warmth of home, the richness of tradition, and the comfort of a modern café — all in a single sip. From day one, our focus has been unshakeable: Consistency, Authenticity, and Affordability.

"This is not coffee... this is emotion."

One evening, a middle-aged man walked into our café and ordered a simple filter coffee. He took one sip, paused, and then smiled. He called us over and said he hadn't tasted this kind of coffee since his mother used to make it 20 years ago. He didn't just finish his coffee — he sat there quietly for 30 minutes, as if reliving memories from another time. Before leaving, he looked at us and said those six words that changed everything for us.

— A Moment That Defined Our Purpose

Why Customers Keep Coming Back

01 🏠

The Feeling of Home

Every cup carries the warmth of a mother's kitchen — that familiar aroma and taste that no chain café can replicate. Nostalgia is our most powerful ingredient.

02 💰

Premium Quality, Real Prices

Great coffee shouldn't cost a fortune. We've made authentic, high-grade filter coffee genuinely affordable — without cutting a single corner on quality.

03 ✅

Consistent Every Single Time

You don't have to guess whether today's cup will be good. From the first visit to the hundredth, the taste, aroma, and experience remain exactly the same.

04 🎨

Modern Comfort, Traditional Soul

A space that feels warm, welcoming, and contemporary — while serving beverages rooted in centuries-old South Indian tradition. Tradition elevated.

05 🌿

Pure, Authentic Ingredients

We use carefully selected, high-grade coffee beans brewed the traditional way — no shortcuts, no artificial flavours. Just real, honest, soulful coffee.

06 🤝

A Brand That Cares

We're not a faceless corporation — we're two brothers who built this from the ground up with love. Customers feel that personal touch in every interaction.

☕ Our Promise to You

✦ Authentic South Indian Taste ✦ Premium Experience ✦ Affordable for Everyone ✦ Consistency in Every Cup ✦ A Story in Every Sip

We started as two brothers with a dream. Today, with every customer who walks in, that dream grows stronger. We are building more than a café brand — we are building a national movement for authentic filter coffee, a trusted franchise opportunity, and a space where tradition meets modern comfort.

So the next time you hold a cup from Madras Coffee Café, remember — you're not just drinking coffee. You're experiencing a story.

— Rohit & Praneeth Sudha, Founders

What We Serve

Our Signature Menu

Crafted with love, brewed with precision

Signature

Filter Coffee

The crown jewel — authentic South Indian decoction coffee brewed the traditional way.

Special

Jaggery Coffee

A soulful blend of rich decoction and natural jaggery — sweetness the natural way.

Hot

Espresso & Cappuccino

Premium espresso shots and velvety cappuccinos — modern café classics with a desi twist.

Cold

Cold Coffee & Iced Latte

Chilled, blended, bold. Cold Coffee and Mocha Frappe to beat the heat.

Specials

Rose Milk & Badam Milk

Traditional favourites — Rose Milk and Badam Milk made fresh every day.

Snacks

Snacks & Bites

Veg puffs, samosas, sandwiches, muffins and breads — the perfect companions to your coffee.

Refreshers

Buttermilk & Fresh Lime Soda

Cool off with freshly churned buttermilk or a zesty lime soda — sweet or salt.

Hot

Tea

A comforting cup of perfectly brewed chai for those who love their tea as much as their coffee.

The four pillars that make every cup extraordinary

01

Premium Quality Beans

Crafted using carefully selected, high-grade coffee beans sourced for their exceptional flavour profile.

02

Authentic Taste

Delivering the true essence of traditional South Indian filter coffee in every single cup — no compromises.

03

Modern + Traditional

Where age-old tradition meets modern comfort and style — a café experience unlike any other.

04

Affordable Pricing

Premium coffee made accessible for everyone. Great taste should never be a luxury only few can afford.

Become a Partner

Own a Madras Coffee Café Franchise

Low investment, compact setup, and a brand with proven demand. Our franchise model is designed for entrepreneurs who want a quick, smooth, and profitable launch.

Franchise Fee
₹2 Lakh
+ GST applicable
Setup Cost

Fully equipped unit
Equipment
₹1 Lakh
Complete machinery
Branding
₹2 Lakh
Full branding package
₹6L

Estimated Annual Profit

Expected ROI in approximately 12 months. Profit depends on location footfall.

Your Path to Launch

1

Select Your Location

Identify a prime spot with minimum 10×10 sq ft space and good footfall.

2

Site Approval

Our team visits and approves your location to ensure brand standards are met.

3

Setup & Installation

Full setup of the compact 8×9×9 ft unit with equipment and complete branding.

4

Hands-On Training

Comprehensive training provided to you and your staff for consistent quality.

5

Launch Day!

Go live and start serving. The whole journey from sign-up to open — 45 days.

☕ Ready to Launch in ~45 Days
